title: FarmingBlock
description: Its a block that will farm for you! Requires a mod that supplies power!
body:
🚜 Farming Block

Automated farming made simple.

⚠️ This Mod is currently in BETA! Please report any bugs you encounter to help improve the mod.

📖 About the Mod

Farming Block introduces a single powerful block that automates the entire farming process. It handles harvesting and storing crops for you, streamlining your agricultural empire.

*   Water Source: The block acts as a water source, hydrating surrounding farmland (place it where the water usually goes).
*   Power Required: This block requires Energy (FE/RF) to operate. You will need a mod that generates power, such as Compressed Furnace.

⚡ Addons & Upgrades

Customize your Farming Block with various addons. There are 3 Tiers for each addon type:

*   📏 Size Addon: Increases the radius of the farm.
*   ⚡ Energy Addon: Increases the internal energy buffer.
*   🏃 Speed Addon: Increases the processing speed of the harvester.
*   🌱 Growth Addon: (Requires Impatient Torch) Increases the growth rate of crops within the farm's range.

✨ Key Features

*   Auto-Output: As of the latest update, you can toggle an Auto-Output button to push harvested items directly into adjacent inventories (chests, drawers, etc.).
*   In-Game Config: No need to restart! Use the command /farming openconfig to tweak settings on the fly.
*   Increased Yields: Each tier provides a 10% output bonus to your harvest.

🌾 Compatibility

Mystical Agriculture: Fully compatible with Mystical Agriculture and Mystical Agradditions farmland.

🆕 Recent Updates

*   Fixes:
*   \* Breaking the block no longer leaves a water source behind (ghost water fixed).
*   \* Fixed scrolling issues in the config screen.
*   Changes:
*   \* Recipes: Updated recipes to require the previous tier for upgrades.
*   \* Impatient Torch: Now uses smaller torches for the Growth Addon recipe.

🤝 Community & Support

Future Plans:

*   📖 A Guidebook is planned for future releases to explain mechanics in detail.

Feedback: Found a bug or have a suggestion?

*   💬 Discord: Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Rcwdr7e) and leave a message in the mod's text channel.
